calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-18-2012 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Hrg Of Default Prove-Up; Brief; Index
Off Calendar Nov-15-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.

Michael A. Papuc, Esq., appearing on his own behalf.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Wstbridge Mutual LLC., and Michael Briscoe.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After evidence and good cause appearing, the Court issues judgment in favor of Plaintiff Michael Papuc, in trust for Hydro Therm Technologies Group, LLC, and in favor of Defendant/Involuntary Plaintiff Hydro Therm Technologies Group, LLC, jointly, against Westbridge Mutual, LLC, and Michael Briscoe, jointly and severally as follows:

Principal $400,000.00
Pre-judgment Interst $26,627.94
Costs of suit are waived
Post-judgment interest at 10% per annum form date of Judgment
For a total judgment in the amount of $426.627.94
Court dinied request for Punitive Damages.
Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-31-2012 Continued To Jan-02-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows:
DEFENDANT HYDRO THERM TECHNOLOGIES GROUP LLC'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS - The matter is off calendar per request of the moving party. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Angie Diner CSR # 9581 = (302/EHG)

Ntc Of Hrg Of Default Prove-Up; Brief; Index
Off Calendar Oct-11-2012 Continued To Nov-15-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for continuance of the Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong #11288.
Matter was taken under submission on 10-04-12 for review.
Michael Papuc, Esq. presen in pro per.
After hearing the arguments and pending the hearing in Dept. 302 on 11-06-12, the court continued the matter to Nov. 15, 2012 at 9:00 a.m. in dept. 514.
Mr. Papuc to give notice to Involuntary Plaintiff/Defendant Hydro Therm Technologies Group, LLC, of the new hearing date.

Ntc Of Hrg Of Default Prove-Up; Brief; Index
Off Calendar Oct-04-2012 Continued To Oct-11-12 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Dept. 514, Judge: Paul Alvarado, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Susan Crozier #4761

Michael Papuc, Esq. presen in pro per, was sworn and examined.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) Michael Briscoe, Westbridge Mutual, LLC.
No appearance by Defendant/Involluntary Plaintiff Hydro Therm Technologies Group, LLC,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court took the matter under submission for review and set the matter on 10-11-12 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 514/
